meaning: American Civil Liberties Union,美国公民自由协会
examples: The ACLU still works hard to get its reports covered by the Times and other national media organizations.
A coalition led by the American Civil Liberties Union (ACLU) had challenged the very basis of Myriad's patents.
The problem is so bad that the ACLU recently created their own Facebook Quiz to demonstrate how much information an app has access to.
As an attorney, I consider this--and so does the ACLU--consider this to be an unlawful arrest.
Since cameras were instrumental in identifying the suspects, the ACLU has a lot to answer for.
